languages.text: {n}Гвардеец недоверчиво озирается, но вскоре все же покидает пост, опасаясь впасть в немилость вышестоящих. Еще некоторое время вы остаетесь на месте, ища взглядом тех, кто мог бы заинтересоваться вашим занятием.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Гвардеец недоверчиво озирается, но вскоре все же покидает пост, опасаясь впасть в немилость вышестоящих. Еще некоторое время вы остаетесь на месте, ища взглядом тех, кто мог бы заинтересоваться вашим занятием.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Гвардеец недоверчиво озирается, но вскоре все же покидает пост, опасаясь впасть в немилость вышестоящих. Еще некоторое время вы остаетесь на месте, ища взглядом тех, кто мог бы заинтересоваться вашим занятием.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

{n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

{n}The guards exchange doubtful looks, but still leave their post for fear of falling into disfavour. You remain at the weapons rack for a while longer, distracting anyone who may be looking. You strive to keep your eyes fixed ahead of you, so you are not entirely certain that your thief has succeeded. You will have to find him later at the agreed location — near the infirmary.{/n}

{n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

{n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

languages.text: {n}守卫狐疑地环顾四周，但到底不敢得罪上级，最终还是离开了岗位。你又多待了一会儿，看是否有人注意到你的行动。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}守卫狐疑地环顾四周，但到底不敢得罪上级，最终还是离开了岗位。你又多待了一会儿，看是否有人注意到你的行动。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le garde lance un regard méfiant à la ronde, mais consent à quitter son poste, de crainte de tomber en disgrâce. Vous restez immobile un moment, pour voir si quiconque s'intéresse à ce que vous faites.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le garde lance un regard méfiant à la ronde, mais consent à quitter son poste, de crainte de tomber en disgrâce. Vous restez immobile un moment, pour voir si quiconque s'intéresse à ce que vous faites.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Muhafız, şüpheyle etrafına bakınıyor ancak yine de üstlerinin gözünden düşme korkusuyla görev yerini terk ediyor. Yaptığın şeyle ilgilenen biri olup olmadığını görmek için bir süre daha hareketsiz kalıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhafız, şüpheyle etrafına bakınıyor ancak yine de üstlerinin gözünden düşme korkusuyla görev yerini terk ediyor. Yaptığın şeyle ilgilenen biri olup olmadığını görmek için bir süre daha hareketsiz kalıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El guardia, dubitativo, mira a su alrededor pero sigue abandonando su puesto por miedo a perder el favor de sus superiores. Permaneces inmóvil un poco más para ver si alguien se interesa por tus acciones.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El guardia, dubitativo, mira a su alrededor pero sigue abandonando su puesto por miedo a perder el favor de sus superiores. Permaneces inmóvil un poco más para ver si alguien se interesa por tus acciones.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Wachmann sieht sich zweifelnd um, verlässt seinen Posten aber dennoch, um nicht bei seinen Vorgesetzten in Ungnade zu fallen. Du verhältst dich noch eine Weile ruhig, um zu sehen, ob sich jemand für dich interessiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Wachmann sieht sich zweifelnd um, verlässt seinen Posten aber dennoch, um nicht bei seinen Vorgesetzten in Ungnade zu fallen. Du verhältst dich noch eine Weile ruhig, um zu sehen, ob sich jemand für dich interessiert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}警備兵はためらって周囲を見渡す。それでも上司に嫌われたくないから、自分の番を離れてしまう。しばらくの間、自分の行動に興味を示す人が現れるかどうかを見守る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The guard glances around doubtfully, but still leaves his post for fear of falling into disfavour with his superiors. You remain still for a while longer to see if anyone takes an interest in what you are doing.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}警備兵はためらって周囲を見渡す。それでも上司に嫌われたくないから、自分の番を離れてしまう。しばらくの間、自分の行動に興味を示す人が現れるかどうかを見守る。{/n}
